Hi Emma — I found restaurants in Paris that match your requests.

Lunch (French, highest rated)
- Le Baratin — Rating: 4.8
- Highlights: Small, cozy bistro with homestyle cooking; daily changing menu using fresh market ingredients; natural wine selection; cash only.
- Estimated cost: ~€30 per person

Dinner (Chinese, highest rated)
- New Asiaway — Rating: 4.6
- Highlights: Authentic Chinese cuisine with a modern twist; fresh ingredients and flavorful sauces; attentive staff; stylish decor.
- Estimated cost: ~€30 per person

If you'd like alternatives:
- French runner-up: Bistrot Paul Bert — Rating 4.5 — ~€40/person
- Chinese runner-up: China Garden — Rating 4.4 — ~€35/person

Would you like me to make reservations for either (time and party size), or send details to your calendar or email?
